title: cmake build fails when --hierarchical option is used
body:
With the ```--hierarchical``` option the configuration fails:
```
-- Executing Verilator...
CMake Error at verilog/CMakeFiles/verilog-simulator-library.dir/Vtest_bench.dir/Vtest_bench_copy.cmake:47 (target_link_libraries):
  Cannot specify link libraries for target "Vtest_bench" which is not built
  by this project.
Call Stack (most recent call first):
  /usr/local/share/verilator/verilator-config.cmake:218 (include)
  verilog/CMakeLists.txt:61 (verilate)
```

Specifically, the file ```Vtest_bench_copy.cmake``` has a new section in the end:
```
# Verilate hierarchical blocks
add_library(Vcore_1 STATIC)
target_link_libraries(Vtest_bench PRIVATE Vcore_1)
verilate(Vcore_1 PREFIX Vcore_1 TOP_MODULE core_1 DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/Vcore_1 SOURCES  /usr/home/yuri/x/verilog/test_bench.v VERILATOR_ARGS -f /usr/home/yuri/x/verilog/CMakeFiles/x.dir/Vtest_bench.dir/Vcore_1_hierCMakeArgs.f -CFLAGS -fPIC)
...
```

The third line in this section causes the above error.
code_blocks:
# Verilate hierarchical blocks
add_library(Vcore_1 STATIC)
target_link_libraries(Vtest_bench PRIVATE Vcore_1)
verilate(Vcore_1 PREFIX Vcore_1 TOP_MODULE core_1 DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/Vcore_1 SOURCES  /usr/home/yuri/x/verilog/test_bench.v VERILATOR_ARGS -f /usr/home/yuri/x/verilog/CMakeFiles/x.dir/Vtest_bench.dir/Vcore_1_hierCMakeArgs.f -CFLAGS -fPIC)
...
